paragraphs: The stock price of Fermi Inc. is 6.65, with a change of 8.66% compared to the prior close and a change of -25.86% over a window of 21 sessions. The price is as of July 21, 2026.

There is one new news item in the last 24 hours, with a headline regarding the second quarter 2026 earnings release and call date. The recent news also includes an announcement from July 21, 2026, about the earnings release and call date, which is scheduled for August 13, 2026.

There have been recent filings, including an 8-K/A form on July 21, 2026, which discloses the resignation of director Miles Everson, and an 8-K form on July 15, 2026, which announces the issuance of $431.25 million in aggregate principal amount of 5.00% convertible senior notes due 2031. There are also social posts, including two new posts in the last 24 hours, with one mentioning the arrival of Siemens turbines at the Port of Houston and another discussing a trade at 6.80.
